## common package

Useful utils for strings, iterables, objects, maps, promises and other commonly used structures <a href="https://badge.fury.io/js/[[packasge]]"><img src="https://badge.fury.io/js/[[packasge]]n.svg" alt="npm version" height="18"></a>
